title: IFF to Webcast 2022 Investor Day Presentations on December 7
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--IFF (NYSE:IFF) today announced that it will webcast its 2022 Investor Day presentation on Wednesday, Dec. 7, 2022, beginning at 1:00 p.m. ET.

title: International Flavors & Fragrances: I Am Still Not Convinced
text: While International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. reported sales were stagnant in the third quarter, sales in constant currency increased 10% year-over-year. Due to a huge goodwill impairment, International Flavors & Fragrances had to report an operating loss and a loss per share in Q3/22.

title: International Flavors (IFF) Q3 Earnings & Sales Top Estimates
text: International Flavors' (IFF) Q3 top line beats estimates but came in line with last year. The company lowered the 2022 sales guidance citing foreign currency impact and a challenging operating environment.

title: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 8, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Michael DeVeau - Head of Investor Relations Frank Clyburn - Chief Executive Officer Glenn Richter - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Adam Samuelson - Goldman Sachs Mark Astrachan - Stifel John Roberts - Credit Suisse Gunther Zechmann - Bernstein Heidi Vesterinen - BNP Paribas Anthony Mercandetti - Deutsche Bank Mike Sison - Wells Fargo Matt Krueger - Baird Josh Spector - UBS Christopher Parkinson - Mizuho Jonathan Feeney - Consumer Edge Matthew DeYoe - Bank of America Operator Good morning. At this time, I would like to welcome everyone to the IFF Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: International Flavors (IFF) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: International Flavors (IFF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.62% and 1.21%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in Store for International Flavors' (IFF) Q3 Earnings?
text: International Flavors' (IFF) Q3 performance is likely to reflect benefits from robust demand for home care and personal categories, although escalating costs might have been a spoilsport.
